description: Product section rebuild: Jan-Mar 2026. Runtime split, indexer migration, transaction queue, smart contracts, and developer surface.

slides.title: Product
slides.subtitle: Runtime split · Indexer migration · Transaction queue · ERC-4337 + Compliance V2 · SDK & observability

slides.title: DALP Runtime Split: DAPI / DDWF / DIDX
slides.col1:
**kit/dapi - HTTP API Service**
• Independently deployable HTTP API + auth service (PR #6121)
• Middleware layered: auth, token hydration, queue preference, wallet verification
• Hono replaced Bun.serve() across all services (PR #6352)
• PostgreSQL notification bridge preserves read-after-write coordination
• Clean service boundary enables targeted, isolated scaling
slides.col2:
**kit/ddwf - Durable Workflow Engine**
• Independently deployable durable workflow engine (PR #6353)
• Manages long-running operations with resumable execution
• Durable transaction processor and approval polling shipped (PR #6181)
• E2E latency cut via fast-path confirmation and event-driven sync (PR #6331)
• Operates without state loss across process restarts or infra failures
slides.col3:
**kit/didx - Standalone Indexer**
• Independently deployable indexer service (PR #6359)
• Owns full read model lifecycle: PostgreSQL-backed, no external graph dependency
• ERC-4337 account abstraction indexer tables and handlers added (PR #6379)
• Directory entity projections added (PR #6370)
• Subgraph retained as DALP_USE_SUBGRAPH=true rollback path only

slides.title: Indexer Migration: The Graph → DALP-owned Postgres
slides.item1:
**Token & Stats Routes Migrated**
Token list, search, holders, events, and compliance routes moved from The Graph to Postgres-backed read models (PR #6221). Token stats moved to Postgres (PR #6286). All token data now owned and served by DALP without third-party graph dependency.
slides.item2:
**Addon & Operator Routes Migrated**
XvP settlement and fixed-yield addon routes moved to the indexer (PR #6397). Activity, entity, actions, and account routes migrated to SQL-backed operator read models (PR #6396). User domain routes also migrated (PR #6395).
slides.item3:
**Directory & ERC-4337 Indexing Added**
Directory entity projections added to the indexer (PR #6370). ERC-4337 account abstraction indexer tables and handlers added, enabling full on-chain account tracking within DALP-owned Postgres (PR #6379).
slides.item4:
**Rollback-Safe Migration Pattern**
Subgraph retained as opt-in rollback path via DALP_USE_SUBGRAPH=true flag. Migration framework ensures zero-downtime route-by-route cutover. Each migrated route is validated against the prior graph output before cutover is confirmed.

slides.title: Transaction Queue: Observable Operational Plane
slides.col1:
**Queue Architecture**
• executeViaQueue established as the shared runtime execution pattern (PR #6204)
• Durable transaction processor with approval polling shipped (PR #6181)
• Nonce recovery, reconciliation, and cancellation workflow hardened (PR #6193)
• All major mutation routes converted: feeds, XvP, token-sale, fixed-yield, system (PR #6287-#6306)
• OpenTelemetry spans added across the full transaction lifecycle (PR #6314)
• E2E latency reduced via fast-path confirmation + event-driven sync (PR #6331)
slides.col2:
**Operator Controls**
• Transaction list, cancel, and admin routes exposed (PR #6284)
• Force-retry, force-fail, and force-nonce admin operations available to operators
• Full transaction lifecycle now observable: queue state, execution status, confirmation
• Every mutation route produces OTel spans for latency and failure tracking
• Operators have direct visibility and intervention capability without manual chain inspection
• Reconciliation workflow ensures no stuck or ghost transactions survive across restarts

slides.title: Contracts, Compliance V2, SDK, and Error Catalog
slides.item1:
**ERC-4337 Account Abstraction**
EntryPoint-aware smart accounts with stable CREATE2 addresses shipped (PR #6317). Weighted multisig validator and paymaster sponsorship added (PR #6329). EntryPoint directory registration and dalpWallet topic wired (PR #6325). DALP wallet claims supported natively.
slides.item2:
**Compliance V2**
Per-token compliance deployment with migration framework and V4 lifecycle shipped (PR #6318). Upgrade-safe binding preserves compliance state across contract upgrades. Transfer approval v2 mutation routes and split compliance interfaces added (PR #6328, #6330). Token feature mutation routes and redeem feature expanded (PR #6272).
slides.item3:
**@settlemint/dalp-sdk Released**
Typed client SDK package with serializers shipped as @settlemint/dalp-sdk (PR #6228). Covers all DALP APIs with typed interfaces. Enables developers to integrate DALP capabilities directly into their own applications without using the operator portal. Ships alongside CLI as a complete programmatic toolset.
slides.item4:
**Error Catalog & Observability**
Full DALP error catalog with typed code unions and localized contract errors generated (PR #6290, #6303-#6309). Error codes surfaced in Dapp UI with support codes and suggested actions (PR #6300). OpenTelemetry tracing across DAPI and signer integrations (PR #6089). Observability dashboards covering namespace resources, Tempo slow-requests, and OTLP metrics pipeline (PR #6174, #6176, #6276).
